name: Cornstarch Paste
recipeInstructions:
- 1 tablespoon Cold water
- 1 teaspoon Cornstarch
- To make the cornstarch paste called for in many of our recipes, mix together cornstarch and cold water. This recipe provides an approximate guide until you find what works best for you. Some cooks prefer a thin paste, while others prefer it thick.
- Thoroughly combine the cornstarch and cold water. Always stir the mixture again just before using, as the starch may settle.
